claim: BOTS v3 (Frothly) breach: initial access via Apache Struts OGNL RCE (CVE-2017-9791) on the public-facing web server; a backdoor ran as tomcat7 with UID=0; local privilege escalation to root via kernel exploit (CVE-2017-16995); the web_admin identity was abused for AWS RunInstances cryptomining; command-and-control was a reverse shell to 45.77.53.176:8088 via /tmp/backpipe. A parallel Windows chain (svcvnc persistence, Password123! credential access, .xlsm phishing, hdoor.exe backdoor) is part of the documented scenario.

_meta.source: analyst-verified reference verdict, derived from the official BOTS v3 answer key; not a live agent capture
